name: webterm
description: Web-based terminal service with SSH, Telnet, and local shell support

scripts.postinstall: cp -f node_modules/@xterm/xterm/css/xterm.css public/lib/xterm.css && cp -f node_modules/@xterm/xterm/lib/xterm.js public/lib/xterm.js && cp -f node_modules/@xterm/addon-fit/lib/addon-fit.js public/lib/addon-fit.js && cp -f node_modules/@xterm/addon-web-links/lib/addon-web-links.js public/lib/addon-web-links.js
